title: Presales Solution Architect
description:
Responsibilities:

• Collaborate with the sales team to identify customer needs.

• Design and propose cloud-based solutions that meet customer needs and align with their strategic goals.

• Develop and deliver presentations, demonstrations, and proof-of-concepts to showcase the value of proposed solutions.

• Provide technical leadership and guidance throughout the project lifecycle.

• Stay current with the latest cloud technologies, industry trends, and competitive

landscape.

• Build strong relations with customers, partners, and internal stakeholders.

• Assist in developing sales strategies and account plans to drive revenue growth.

• Participate in industry events, conference, and webinars to promote the company’s cloud solutions.

• Prepare and maintain technical documentation, including architecture diagrams, solution briefs, and customer proposals.

• Document customer interactions, solution designs, and feedback for internal use and continuous improvement.

• Conduct internal knowledge-sharing sessions to improve team capabilities.

• Any other ad-hoc duties assigned

Requirements:

• 3 years of experience in a presales role in the industry

• Experience in cloud-based deployment and management in IaaS, PaaS and SaaS environments

• Ability to manage a project, work to deadlines, and prioritize between competing demands

postedCompany.description:
#WeAreTrueWatch — where complexity meets clarity, empowering teams to Observe Beyond.


Beyond dashboards. Beyond alerts. Beyond what’s expected.


In today’s digital world, businesses face a surge of data, growing system complexity, and widening visibility gaps. Traditional monitoring falls short—what teams need now is TRUE, UNIFIED OBSERVABILITY. That’s why we built TrueWatch: a platform designed to help organizations observe not just what’s happening, but why, and what to do next.


Founded by digital transformation experts who understood the cost of fragmented tools and siloed insights, TrueWatch was created to bring a smarter, more connected approach to observability.


Headquartered in Singapore, with regional teams in Indonesia and Taiwan, we unify the full spectrum of observability—across development, operations, and business functions—into a single, powerful platform. From data collection to visualization, and from frontend to backend, we bring full-stack visibility, security insights, and data-driven confidence under one roof.


But what truly drives us isn’t just technology—it’s our people. We’re a team of curious minds, bold builders, and passionate problem-solvers who believe in pushing boundaries and observing beyond the surface.


At TrueWatch, we turn complexity into clarity so every team, every system, and every user can perform at their best—with trust, transparency, and speed.


UNIFY. MONITOR. VISUALIZE. TRUST.


We’re not just monitoring—we’re understanding. And together, we’re building the future of observability.
postedCompany.name: TRUEWATCH TECHNOLOGY INC PTE. LTD.
